div.p: Implementation Reference: internal/network/topology.go Pattern: Multiple Readers / Single Writer (sync.RWMutex)
text R1: [====RLock====] R2: [==RLock==] ✓ Concurrent R3: [==RLock==] ✓ Concurrent W1: [--WAIT--][===Lock===] ✗ Blocks W/R R4: [--WAIT--][RLock]

p.em: Invariant: Writer-priority ensures no starvation under high read load.

div.p: Key: NodeID (sha256 hash string) Value: *Peer (8-byte pointer)
